contents.value:
```dart
void print(Object? object)
```
Prints an object to the console output.

```dart
void debugPrint(String? message, {int? wrapWidth})
```
Prints a message to the console with throttling to avoid dropped log lines.

```dart
void main([List<String> args])
```
The top-level entry point for a Dart application.

```dart
factory Future.delayed(Duration duration, [FutureOr<T> computation()?])
```
Creates a future that completes after a delay with an optional computed value.

```dart
static Future<List<T>> Future.wait<T>(Iterable<Future<T>> futures, {bool eagerError = false, void cleanUp(T successValue)?})
```
Waits for multiple futures to complete and returns their results as a list.

```dart
factory Future.value([FutureOr<T>? value])
```
Creates a future completed with the given value.

```dart
Future<R> compute<Q, R>(ComputeCallback<Q, R> callback, Q message)
```
Spawns an isolate to run a callback function with a message.

```dart
void runApp(Widget app)
```
Inflates the given widget and attaches it to the screen.

```dart
void setState(VoidCallback fn)
```
Notifies the framework that the internal state of this object has changed.

```dart
void expect(dynamic actual, dynamic matcher, {String? reason})
```
Asserts that actual matches the given matcher in a test.

```dart
static Future<Isolate> Isolate.spawn<T>(void entryPoint(T message), T message)
```
Creates and spawns an isolate that runs the given function.

```dart
static Future<T?> Navigator.push<T>(BuildContext context, Route<T> route)
```
Pushes a new route onto the navigator stack.

```dart
abstract class int extends num
```
An integer number. On native platforms values range from -2^63 to 2^63-1.

```dart
abstract class double extends num
```
A double-precision floating-point number (IEEE 754).

```dart
abstract class num implements Comparable<num>
```
An integer or floating-point number; supertype of int and double.

```dart
abstract class String implements Comparable<String>, Pattern
```
A sequence of UTF-16 code units.

```dart
class bool
```
Represents true and false values.

```dart
abstract class List<E> implements EfficientLengthIterable<E>
```
An indexable collection of objects with a length.

```dart
abstract class Map<K, V>
```
A collection of key-value pairs from which values are retrieved using their associated keys.

```dart
abstract class Set<E> extends EfficientLengthIterable<E>
```
A collection of objects in which each object can occur only once.

```dart
dynamic
```
A special type that disables static type checking. Any member access is allowed.

```dart
void
```
Indicates a function returns no value.

```dart
class Object
```
The base class for all Dart objects. Every class except Null inherits from Object.

```dart
class Null
```
The class of the null value. The only instance is null.

```dart
Never
```
A type that has no values; used for functions that never return (always throw).

```dart
abstract class Future<T>
```
An object representing a delayed computation; the result will be available at some later time.

```dart
abstract class Stream<T>
```
A source of asynchronous data events; delivers a sequence of events over time.

```dart
abstract class Iterable<E>
```
A collection of values (elements) that can be accessed sequentially.

```dart
class Duration implements Comparable<Duration>
```
A span of time, such as 27 days, 4 hours, 12 minutes, and 3 seconds.

```dart
class DateTime implements Comparable<DateTime>
```
An instant in time, such as July 20, 1969, 8:18pm GMT.

```dart
abstract class Uri
```
A parsed URI, such as a URL.

```dart
abstract class RegExp implements Pattern
```
A compiled regular expression pattern.

```dart
abstract class Symbol
```
Opaque name used by mirrors, invocations, and Map literals with # prefix.

```dart
abstract class Type
```
Runtime representation of a type.

```dart
abstract class BigInt implements Comparable<BigInt>
```
An arbitrarily large integer.

```dart
abstract class Completer<T>
```
A way to produce Future objects and complete them later with a value or error.

```dart
abstract class Timer
```
A count-down timer that fires a callback when it reaches zero.

```dart
abstract class Function
```
The base class for all function types.

```dart
abstract class Record
```
The base class for all record types (Dart 3). Records are anonymous, immutable aggregate types.

```dart
abstract class Pattern
```
An interface for basic searches within strings; implemented by String and RegExp.

```dart
abstract class Comparable<T>
```
Interface for classes with a natural ordering among instances.

```dart
abstract class Iterator<E>
```
An interface for getting items one at a time from an object.

```dart
abstract class Sink<T>
```
A generic sink that accepts data via add and closes via close.

```dart
abstract class StreamController<T> implements StreamSink<T>
```
A controller with the stream it controls, allowing sending of events on the stream.

```dart
abstract class StreamSubscription<T>
```
A subscription on events from a Stream; allows pausing, resuming, and cancelling.

```dart
FutureOr<T>
```
A type representing values that are either Future<T> or T.

```dart
abstract class StatelessWidget extends Widget
```
A widget that does not require mutable state.

```dart
abstract class StatefulWidget extends Widget
```
A widget that has mutable state.

```dart
class Scaffold extends StatefulWidget
```
Implements the basic Material Design visual layout structure.

```dart
class Container extends StatelessWidget
```
A convenience widget combining common painting, positioning, and sizing widgets.

```dart
abstract class BuildContext
```
A handle to the location of a widget in the widget tree.

```dart
abstract class Widget extends DiagnosticableTree
```
Describes the configuration for an Element.
